commands_run.notes: Config validation, testcase validation (21 IDs), and testcase index build all passed.
forthams.example.json config validation passed after smoke path fix.
All 26 tests (13 CERT tests × 2 projects) listed successfully. CERT-11/12/13 confirmed present.
Detected 0 double-prefix issues, 0 frontend prefix issues, 2 placeholder stats endpoints (known). New placeholder detection working correctly.

verification_results: npm run check: passed (config validation + testcase validation + index build)
Playwright test listing: all 26 tests listed correctly including new CERT-11/12/13
validate-backend-patterns.mjs: correctly detects 2 placeholder stats endpoints (DisposalController.stats, AuditDashboardController.stats)
All 4 new test cases (TC-WEB-JAVA-015~018) present and validated in testcases index
All smoke API paths no longer have /api/ double prefix; FORTHAMS-DISPOSALS corrected to /disposals; FORTHAMS-AUDIT-LOG corrected to /audit-logs/list
Mock data for categories, locations, vendors added to createMockState() and mockApi() handlers
residual_risks: Playwright 实际运行需要启动 forthAMS 后端和前端服务才能验证 CERT-11/12/13 的实际通过率
DisposalController.stats() 和 AuditDashboardController.stats() 硬编码返回 0 值，业务校验测试 CERT-11 只能验证路径可达但无法验证统计逻辑正确性
部分 smoke 端点（如 /stats/overview, /approval/list, /workflows/list 等）的去前缀后路径可能与后端实际 Controller 映射不完全一致，需在真实运行环境中验证
新增的 validate-backend-patterns.mjs 前端双前缀检测需要后端服务目录下有前端源码才能生效
